items.name: 新山城跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: Historic site among the monuments (historic sites, places of scenic beauty and natural monuments). Town-designated by Futaba Town on 1976-02-27. Located at Aza Higashidate 173 and adjacent lots, Oaza Niiyama, Futaba Town.

items.name: 両竹磨崖仏
items.location: 双葉町大字両竹字稲荷廹262

en.description_en: Tangible cultural property. Town-designated by Futaba Town on 1976-02-27. Located at Aza Inarizako 262, Oaza Ryochiku, Futaba Town.

items.name: 鴻草磨崖仏
items.location: 双葉町大字鴻草字東廹

en.description_en: Tangible cultural property. Town-designated by Futaba Town on 1976-02-27. Located at Aza Higashizako, Oaza Konokusa, Futaba Town.

items.name: 十一面観世音座像
items.location: 双葉町大字目廹字長廹88（目廹観音堂内）

en.description_en: Tangible cultural property (sculpture). Town-designated by Futaba Town on 1976-02-27. Located at Aza Nagazako 88, Oaza Mezako, Futaba Town (in Mezako Kannon Hall).

items.name: 阿弥陀仏如来座像
items.location: 双葉町大字長塚字寺内前262（寺内前観音堂内）

en.description_en: Tangible cultural property (sculpture). Town-designated by Futaba Town on 1976-02-27. Located at Aza Teramae 262, Oaza Nagatsuka, Futaba Town (in Teramae Kannon Hall).
